## Dependency Checklist (when adding new packages)
- [ ] Documented in PR why this package is needed
- [ ] Completed `docs/standards/dependency-evaluation.md` checklist
- [ ] Owner/maintenance plan documented

## Afterflight / Merge checklist
- [ ] Preflight run and acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Tests passing
- [ ] Observability configured (Sentry/metrics) for critical changes
- [ ] Add to `docs/development/preferred-libraries.md` if this becomes our recommended choice
